headlines.title: Li Bang International (LBGJ) boosts at-the-market share program to $60M - Stock Titan
Li Auto (NASDAQ: LI) files to sell 98,000 Class A shares via Futu - Stock Titan

verification.primary_claim: LI gap lacks a clear fundamental catalyst; likely technical breakout or flow-driven.
verification.discrepancy_note: The primary claim states 'LI gap lacks a clear fundamental catalyst', implying a positive price movement without a clear reason. However, Source B [1] reports LI 'files to sell 98,000 Class A shares', which is a specific fundamental event generally considered negative. Source B [2] reports 'Li Auto (LI) Is Down 8.7% After Weak Q2 Outlook', which is a specific negative fundamental event and a negative price movement, directly contradicting the implication of a 'gap' (usually positive) and providing clear fundamental catalysts, albeit negative ones.
